overview.description: The Nuveen Securitized Income ETF (NSCI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund is an actively managed vehicle of securitized credit instruments across any credit qualities and maturities. The fund seeks a high level of current income and total return. NSCI was launched on Sep 23, 2025 and is issued by Nuveen.
